name: Team Member Row
description: Team member display row with avatar, name, email, role badge, join date, and management actions (change role, remove).

standard.description: Full team member row with avatar, name, email, role badge, joined date, and role-change/remove actions.

slots.actions: Role Select dropdown and Remove Button

card.description: Card-style team member for grid layouts. Avatar centered, name below, role badge, and actions.

invite.description: Pending invitation row showing email, invited-by, expiry, and resend/cancel actions.
